name: find_security_sensitive
query: FIND function WHERE name LIKE "*Auth*" OR name LIKE "*Login*" OR name LIKE "*Crypt*" OR name LIKE "*Valid*"
examples: FIND function WHERE name LIKE "*Login*" OR name LIKE "*Password*"
FIND function WHERE name LIKE "*Crypt*" OR name LIKE "*Hash*" OR name LIKE "*Encrypt*"
